summary: Made one surgical seam edit at the chapter close: the exit now lands on Kai and Lena moving out together under public scrutiny instead of repeating Chapter 16's fluorescent-space hand-hold beat. The opening already entered on a distinct enough footing, so no entry rewrite was needed.
edits: Replaced the final hand-hold image with Lena quietly taking Kai's compromised side and leaving with him.
Kept the closing emphasis on the public 'holdout' framing so the handoff into Chapter 18 stays outward-facing rather than privately resolved.
